title: Repo Execution Profile
description: Schema for repo-local execution profiles consumed by orchestration skills such as /evolve and /rpi.

startup_reads.description: Ordered repo files that bootstrap an autonomous run before work selection begins.

goals_source.description: Canonical and compatibility goal sources for the repo.

validation_commands.description: Ordered validation bundle the repo expects before landing substantive work.

validation_lanes.description: Structured metadata for validation commands, including mutation behavior and release-only gates.

tracker_commands.description: Repo-scoped tracker command wrappers and shell policy.

work_selection_order.description: Preferred source ladder for autonomous work selection.

definition_of_done.description: Concrete predicates that determine when a cycle or full autonomous run can stop.

validation_lane.description: One validation command plus machine-readable mutation and isolation metadata.

name.description: Stable lane identifier for packet consumers.

command.description: Shell command. Keep aligned with validation_commands when this lane is part of the default landing bundle.

purpose.description: Human-readable reason to run this lane.

read_only.description: True when the lane should not mutate tracked repo files or persistent agent state.

writes_artifacts.description: True when the lane intentionally writes validation or release artifacts.

artifact_paths.description: Known artifact paths or globs written by this lane.

isolated_agents_home.description: True when agents should run the command with isolated HOME/AGENTS_HOME or equivalent no-citation state.

release_only.description: True when the lane is intended for release readiness rather than fast everyday validation.

mutation_escape_hatch.description: Named opt-in that permits intentional mutation, or null when no mutation is allowed.

cost_class.description: Relative cost of the lane for routine agent validation.

auto_select.description: When agents may select this lane without an explicit operator request.

timeout_seconds.description: Recommended wall-clock timeout for routine agent execution of this lane.

expensive_reason.description: Required operational rationale when cost_class is expensive or auto_select is explicit/release-only.
